## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration opportunities between Josh Grant (Webflow) and Marcel Santilli (growthx.ai).](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both Josh and Marcel have extensive backgrounds in building and scaling tech companies, with a shared passion for hands-on execution and innovation](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [growthx.ai is rapidly growing, offering AI-powered content creation and optimization services, with plans for a Series B fundraise](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential collaboration areas include advisory roles, referrals, podcast appearances, and possible equity involvement for Josh](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Personal and Professional Backgrounds

  - [Josh: Ninth-grade dropout who built a successful graphic design agency, transitioned to enterprise tech, and now leads growth at Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Marcel: Brazilian-born entrepreneur who started in graphic design, built successful content platforms at IBM and HP, and now co-founded growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

### growthx.ai Overview

  - [Offers AI-powered content creation and optimization services](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Revenue: \~$10M ARR, 50 customers, 70 employees](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Average deal size: $150k-$180k/year](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2647.0)
  - [Building advanced AI workflows and an "expert layer" for human intervention](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Plans for Series B fundraise in \~6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2920.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Josh to potentially join as an advisor before the Series B raise](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Referral arrangement for Josh's inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
  - [Possible equity involvement for Josh](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2887.0)
  - [Podcast recording planned during Josh's upcoming SF visit](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3129.0)

### Future Vision and Personal Goals

  - [Josh: Seeking more freedom and flexibility while still building and creating](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Marcel: Building a "playground" for innovation while scaling growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [Both emphasize the importance of working with good people and maintaining work-life balance](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)

### Industry Insights

  - [Discussion on the rarity of true builders and executors in the tech industry](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Challenges of political landscapes in growing tech companies (e.g., Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Josh to send potential referrals to Marcel for growthx.ai services](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2972.0)
  - [Marcel to develop a referral model and explore equity options for Josh](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2887.0)
  - [Schedule regular catch-up calls to continue the conversation](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3007.0)
  - [Coordinate podcast recording during Josh's upcoming San Francisco visit](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=3129.0)
  - [Marcel to discuss potential collaboration with his board and leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/x-41Sow4C1P-KinrxxmoxzNrM1tz7Zxo?tab=summary&timestamp=2613.0)
